meta.title: Log Ghost — Stop shipping console.logs to production
meta.description: Find debug logs, see who added them with git blame, and block yours before production. VS Code extension.

hero.headline: Stop shipping console.logs to production
hero.subhead: Log Ghost finds every debug statement in your codebase, tells you who added it, and removes yours before you commit. Your teammates' logs stay untouched.
hero.proofLine: Used by 2,400+ developers · Rated 4.9 on VS Code Marketplace

rows.codelens: critical · you · 2 hrs ago · remove · keep
rows.codeHtml: console.log(token, secret)

rows.codelens: debug log · sara · 3 days ago · remove · keep
rows.codeHtml: console.log('auth ok')
console.log('server started')

features.headline: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.lead: Built for the editor, not a dashboard.

items.title: Git blame integration
items.body: Knows exactly who added every log. Only flags yours — never creates noise about logs your teammates wrote intentionally.

items.title: Pre-commit gate
items.body: Intercepts your commit if you have debug logs in staged files. One click to clean them. Or override and commit anyway — no judgment.

items.title: Severity classification
items.body: Automatically classifies logs as critical (sensitive data), debug (noise), or safe (intentional). Color-coded in the gutter.

items.title: Codebase-wide panel
items.body: A full sidebar showing every log across every file. Filter by author, severity, or file. Remove in bulk or one at a time.

items.title: Inline CodeLens
items.body: Author, timestamp, severity — all visible above the line without opening any panel. Remove or keep without leaving the editor.

items.title: Zero config
items.body: Works the moment you install it. Reads your git config. No setup files, no tokens, no team account required.

howItWorks.headline: How it works
howItWorks.lead: Three steps from chaos to clean commits.

steps.title: Scans on save
steps.body: Log Ghost scans your workspace on every file save and builds a map of every console.log with its severity and git blame data.

steps.title: Shows you what matters
steps.body: Your logs get flagged. Teammates' logs are visible but dimmed. The sidebar shows everything. The editor shows just what needs action.

steps.title: Cleans before commit
steps.body: When you commit, Log Ghost checks staged files for your debug logs and gives you one chance to remove them before the push.

editorShowcase.headline: See it in the editor
editorShowcase.lead: Side-by-side: workspace overview and inline context.

finalCta.headline: Clean code starts before the PR
finalCta.sub: Install in 30 seconds. No account required.

button.label: Install for VS Code — it's free

footer.bottom: Built for developers who care about clean commits
